data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the acceptance workflow for substitutes, but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an acceptance workflow, but the evidence does not include any API reads or state checks confirming that substitutes can accept or decline offers. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an acceptance workflow for substitutes to accept or decline offers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
